title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Verify that Third-party Software licenses with Source and License links are displayed consistently under App Settings > General > Licenses and Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements
steps: Verify a list of licenses is displayed
Verify a Source link is displayed
Verify a License link is displayed
Verify the same list of licenses is present
expected: The 'Third-party Software' headline is visible under App Settings > General > Licenses, with a list of licenses. Each license displays both a Source link and a License link. The same licenses are also present in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
